boundary: Rust/local owns substrate validation and regression coverage. Browser/Studio surfaces are read-only inspection only. Coverage uses state/shape assertions only; no timing, no network, no live browser, trusted writes, auto-apply, auto-merge, automated fun score, production-ready claim, or Godot replacement/parity claim. Generated runs/artifacts remain untracked unless fixture-scoped. #1 and #23 remain open governance anchors.

scenarios.expect: same seed/config resolves to identical state, 3 read-only shop offers, and a 16-char digest
seed perturbation changes deck or digest while preserving schema shape
undeclared card refs fail closed before state resolution
existing deck-roguelike scene migrates to the fixture-scoped substrate golden by value
engine-builder deckbuilder remains a distinct config over the substrate, not a parallel engine
demo manifest enumerates both fixture-scoped runs without network, live browser, or trusted writes
the pre-substrate deck-roguelike v31 golden remains present and well formed
docs preserve generated-state boundaries, conservative wording, and #1/#23 open anchors
